messages.content:
Generate a domino run concept.

Locked values (do not change):
  domino_count: 300
  domino_width: 0.08
  domino_height: 0.4
  domino_depth: 0.06
  spacing_ratio: 0.35
  path_amplitude: 1.0
  path_cycles: 2.0
  domino_mass: 0.3
  domino_friction: 0.6
  domino_bounce: 0.1
  trigger_impulse: 1.5
  trigger_tilt_degrees: 8.0
  duration_sec: 65

Archetype for this video: s_curve
Palette for this video: sunset

Output ONLY valid JSON matching the response schema.

successful_output.title: 300 Dominoes Flow Like Fire -- Sunset S-Curve
successful_output.visual_brief: Three hundred warm-toned dominoes snake in a sweeping S-curve across a dark ground plane, lit by a rich amber-to-violet sunset gradient. The cascade rolls smoothly from deep orange at the start through blazing coral and dusty rose, finishing with a dramatic ramp finale bathed in purple twilight.
